parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant "進行役" as Moderator
participant "自分: プレイヤー" as Me
participant "隣のプレイヤー: プレイヤー" as Neighbor
participant "隣のプレイヤーの手札: 手札" as NeighborHand

activate Moderator
Moderator -> Me : 順番を指名する(隣のプレイヤー)
activate Me
Me -> Neighbor : 手札を出す()
activate Neighbor
Neighbor --> Me : 手札
deactivate Neighbor
Me -> NeighborHand : カードを引く()
activate NeighborHand
NeighborHand --> Me : カード
deactivate NeighborHand
deactivate Me
deactivate Moderator
@enduml
```
